name: Larry's Dark Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs, oil, and brown sugar together.
2. Add vanilla, zucchini, and molasses to the mixture.
3. Mix dry ingredients: flour, salt, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, allspice, and nutmeg separately.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the zucchini mixture.
5. Stir in chopped nuts.
6. Pour batter into a floured loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for approximately 1 hour.
Larry bakes bread when we grow zucchini. This is my favorite version. His is the Light bread version. I have used both recipes for years. Don't remember the original inspiration, this has been tweaked over time.
